scripts.test:security: vitest run tests/security && pnpm audit --prod --audit-level high
scripts.test:range: pnpm test:media && pwsh -File tools/environment/install-caddy.ps1 && pwsh -File tools/environment/install-tusd.ps1 && pwsh -File tools/testing/range-predeploy.ps1
scripts.test:rtc: pwsh -File tools/environment/install-mediamtx.ps1 && pwsh -File tools/environment/install-livekit.ps1 && pwsh -File tools/testing/rtc-native-smoke.ps1 && pwsh -File tools/testing/livekit-five-client.ps1
scripts.verify: pnpm env:check && pnpm plan:lint && pnpm test:ids && pnpm lint && pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build:web && pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:security && pnpm test:coverage && pnpm test:media && pnpm test:worker && pnpm test:range && pnpm test:compose && pnpm test:rtc && pnpm test:backup && pnpm release:manifest && pnpm openapi:check && pnpm test:e2e
